Case# CWErr.cwAuthenticationAlgorithmUnsupportedErr

macOS 10.6+

```
case cwAuthenticationAlgorithmUnsupportedErr
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/corewlan/cwerr/cwauthenticationalgorithmunsupportederr#Discussion)

Specified authentication algorithm is not supported.
